_meta.description: Fallback presets when no platform-specific preset matches a capture URL. Preserves Hunchly's original image extent. Replace with real per-style presets from your style guides as cases come in.

facebook.notes: Fallback only — preserves Hunchly's original extent. Define real per-style presets per your guide for crops/resizes.
